arts.sum: However, he wants to join Liverpool 😳

arts.ttl: ‘Quite satisfied’: Chris Sutton says Arne Slot will be quietly happy with what Arsenal did this weekend
arts.sum: Liverpool maintained their seven-point gap over Arsenal with a win over Wolves on Sunday. Indeed, Liverpool got over the line against Wolves, despite a difficult...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star shares Liverpool Champions League revenge ambition before Man City clash
arts.sum: Liverpool already beat Real Madrid in the Champions League this season, but one of the Spanish club's stars wants a rematch

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher shares his inside information on Liverpool's Mohamed Salah contract offer
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah and Liverpool remain in a contract standoff but Anfield legend Jamie Carragher has confirmed that the club have previously offered their star man a new deal

arts.ttl: Is title race over if Liverpool go 10 clear? History suggests not...
arts.sum: Liverpool find themselves in a commanding position in the Premier League title race. Few teams have fumbled it from here. But it has been done.

arts.ttl: 'Concrete possibility': Fabrizio Romano names the player who is now expected to leave Liverpool in the summer
I'm John McGinn's cousin who was slammed for X-rated Rangers tackle - my boss BOOED me and Celtic fans called me a legend
arts.sum: Football runs in the family for Scotland hero John McGinn with cousin Kieran Gibbons joining brothers Stephen and Paul in having played professionally

arts.ttl: Liverpool discover final Ibrahima Konate red card verdict after Wolves controversy
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Mark Wakefield, Matthew Abbott, Isaac Seelochan, Kieran Horn)
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as ECHO writers debate whether or not Ibrahima Konate should have been sent off in the win over Wolves

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah to trigger 'HISTORIC' transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to back Arne Slot in the transfer market this summer and Mohamed Salah ’s potential exit could trigger a "historic" few months of spending. However, TEAMtalk have claimed that his exit could trigger potentially the biggest summer transfer window in Liverpool’s history.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'preparing to tempt' Newcastle with audacious Alexander Isak swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to tempt Newcastle United with an audacious swap deal for prolific striker Alexander Isak.
